name: Bean Stew with Corn Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the soup as directed in the Not-So-Meaty Bean Soup recipe, except do not blend the cooked mixture. Instead, using a fork, slightly mash the cooked bean mixture. Return the mixture to boiling.
2. Combine the ingredients for the dumplings in a medium bowl and mix with a fork until combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough mixture onto the bubbling stew, creating 6 to 8 dumplings.
4. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 10 to 12 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center of a dumpling comes out clean. Do not lift the cover until the dumplings have cooked for 10 minutes.
5. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
